name: mask-reveal
title: MaskReveal
description: Reveals text from behind a retreating mask. The text is rendered fully from frame 0 — only a clip-path inset shrinks, uncovering the text edge-by-edge with a crisp hard edge. Direction names the side the text comes in from.

files.content:
{
  "name": "mask-reveal",
  "title": "MaskReveal",
  "description": "Reveals text from behind a retreating mask. The text is rendered fully from frame 0 — only a clip-path inset shrinks, uncovering the text edge-by-edge with a crisp hard edge. Direction names the side the text comes in from.",
  "category": "entrances",
